faqs.question: How often should drains be professionally cleaned?
faqs.answer: We recommend routine drain cleaning at least once a year for most homes. Kitchens and bathrooms with heavy use may benefit from more frequent service.

faqs.question: What does a sewer inspection involve?
faqs.answer: Our scheduled sewer inspections use video camera technology to examine the interior of your sewer lines, identifying root intrusion, cracks, buildup, and other issues before they cause backups.

faqs.question: What are signs that my drains need maintenance?
faqs.answer: Slow-draining sinks, gurgling sounds, recurring clogs, and unpleasant odors are all signs your drains need professional attention. Contact us to schedule a cleaning.

faqs.question: Can regular drain maintenance prevent sewer backups?
faqs.answer: Yes. Routine cleaning removes buildup before it causes blockages, and regular inspections catch tree root intrusion and pipe damage early — significantly reducing the risk of sewer backups.
